comments.body:
This is a duplicate of #128, with a bit more variable renaming.

… and separating the vendor update commit and the code changes; I suppose I should squash them in the final version so that we don’t have an intermediate broken commit, shouldn’t I?
closed #128 - also yes, pls squash so git bisect works fine
LGTM feel free to merge after squash and tests
mmm why isn't Travis using some Docker cache to speed up container build - I should look into it

seems like there isn't any good way https://github.com/travis-ci/travis-ci/issues/5358 (unless building and publishing our test docker image, which I don't like). I believe caching can be easily achieved with Jenkins but I don't have clue where to host such a CI infra
